title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Oberoi Realty

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Oberoi Realty
jsonLd.description:
Oberoi Realty has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Rajkot office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Oberoi Realty:
Oberoi Realty is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Realty!
